steps.title: Convert 50% to decimal form
steps.content:
The phrase 50% of 600 means multiply 600 by 50%.
$$50\% = \frac{50}{100} = 0.5$$
So the calculation becomes: $600 \times 0.5$

steps.title: Multiply to find the result
steps.content:
$$600 imes 0.5 = 300$$
Because 50% means one-half, this result is also the same as taking half of 600. No additional percent conversion is needed after the multiplication. That is the correct answer.
